name: Stuffed Monster Zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the giant zucchini horizontally and scoop out the seeds.
2. Cook the lentils in water until just tender.
3. In a separate pot, cook the rice using very little water until nearly done.
4. Sauté celery, onion, and garlic (no more than 1-2 cloves) in a pan until fragrant.
5. Add the cooked lentils, rice, celery mixture, cumin, and thyme to the sautéed vegetables.
6. Stuff the zucchini with the rice and lentil mixture.
7. Place the stuffed zucchini on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F (175°C) or 400°F (200°C) until the zucchini is tender.
8. If the surface of the stuffing becomes burned or dry, brush it aside before serving.
